meaning: n.[生]复制子(DNA的组分,一种遗传单元)
examples: Each segment of DNA thus synthesized is called a replicon.
Jia YT, Wei L. Subgenomic replicon model of hepatitis C virus and its application. Chin J Hepatol, 2005,13:158-160.
Selecting template and the binding of transcription factors with RNA pol to form replicon are two major regulatory means.
